sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: ASML (ASML) Gained 55.8% in 2025
feed.summary: Emerald Wealth Partners' Q4 2025 investor letter for its "Focused Equity Strategy" highlighted ASML Holding N.V. (ASML) as a strong performer, gaining 55.8% in 2025 and contributing significantly to the portfolio's returns. The firm attributes ASML's bright prospects to the high demand for silicon in AI infrastructure deployment. While ASML showed strong performance, the article notes that 101 hedge funds held ASML, but suggests certain AI stocks may offer greater upside potential with less risk.

feed.title: Chipotle Set to Open Newest State College Area Location
feed.summary: Chipotle is opening its third Centre County location and first with a drive-thru pickup lane at 1880 S. Atherton St. in College Township on March 18. This new "Chipotlane" facility will operate daily from 10:45 a.m. to 10 p.m. and plans for another new location near Bellefonte are in progress. The store will offer its standard menu, new high-protein items, and special rewards for college students.

feed.title: Liquid Networx Wins Two Partner of the Year Awards at Fortinet Accelerate 2026
feed.summary: Liquid Networx has been recognized with two Partner of the Year Awards at Fortinet Accelerate 2026, marking them as the first North American partner to achieve this distinction. They were named Fortinet's first Engage Preferred Services Partner (EPSP) Partner of the Year and, for the third consecutive year, the Unified SASE Partner of the Year. These awards highlight Liquid Networx's exceptional service delivery, expertise in securing hybrid workforces with Fortinet Unified SASE, and commitment to customer satisfaction.

feed.title: Is Motorola Solutions (MSI) Pricing In Too Much Growth After Recent Contract Wins?
feed.summary: Motorola Solutions (MSI) stock has seen significant gains recently, prompting questions about its valuation. A Discounted Cash Flow (DCF) analysis suggests the stock is 21.3% overvalued at its current price of $462.63, with an intrinsic value estimated at $381.29 per share. Furthermore, its P/E ratio of 35.58x is above Simply Wall St's calculated Fair Ratio of 26.12x, indicating it may be overvalued based on earnings.

feed.title: Raymond James Financial (RJF) Completes GreensLedge Acquisition
feed.summary: Raymond James Financial (NYSE: RJF) has completed its acquisition of GreensLedge Holdings LLC, a boutique investment bank specializing in structured credit and securitization. This acquisition, announced in October 2025 and finalized on March 2, 2026, aims to enhance Raymond James' capital markets capabilities and fix income offerings. Additionally, Raymond James' Board of Directors approved a quarterly cash dividend of $0.54 per share, payable on April 15, 2026, to shareholders on record by April 1, 2026.

feed.title: 5 Industrials Stocks With Whale Alerts In Today's Session
feed.summary: This article identifies five industrials stocks that experienced significant options activity, known as "whale alerts," during today's trading session. These alerts signify large-scale options trades that could indicate unusual market sentiment. The article details the specific call and put options, expiration dates, strike prices, and underlying sentiments (bullish, bearish, neutral) for EHang Holdings, American Airlines Group, Lockheed Martin, Boeing, and Axon Enterprise.

feed.title: KKR (KKR) explores $3 billion sale of data center cooling firm CoolIT Systems
feed.summary: KKR is reportedly exploring the sale of CoolIT Systems, a data center cooling solutions provider, in a deal that could value the company at approximately $3 billion. This potential sale highlights the growing interest in infrastructure supporting the booming data center industry, particularly advanced cooling technologies crucial for high-performance computing.

feed.title: ASML Stock Climbed 83% Last Year. Here’s Why It Could Deliver 80% More Upside
feed.summary: ASML, the sole supplier of EUV lithography machines, saw its stock climb 83% last year and is predicted to deliver 80% more upside. This growth is driven by record Q4 2025 bookings, strong AI-driven demand across its customer base, and increasing sales of its most advanced products and services, leading to robust revenue and EPS growth forecasts. Wall Street analysts and TIKR’s valuation model both support a significant increase in ASML's stock price, despite potential risks related to China and High NA adoption timing.

feed.title: Tony Ciero's Top Picks: Microsoft Corp, ServiceNow & Tourmaline Oil
feed.summary: Tony Ciero, Vice President and Senior Portfolio Manager at Caldwell Securities, has shared his top stock picks. His current recommendations for investors are Microsoft Corp, ServiceNow, and Tourmaline Oil. The article also provides links to related videos featuring Ciero's previous picks and market outlooks as well as other analysts' recommendations.

feed.title: Western Digital Corp Stock (WDC) Moved Up by 5.03% on Mar 13: What Investors Need To Know
feed.summary: Western Digital Corp (WDC) saw its stock price increase by 5.03% on March 13, driven by strong demand for high-capacity HDDs for cloud and AI workloads. The company's Q2 FY2026 earnings exceeded expectations, and management set an ambitious "Road to $20 EPS" target within three years. Positive analyst ratings, upgrades, and the company's innovation roadmap also contributed to investor confidence.

feed.title: Cardinal Health announces closure of Augusta factory, more than 200 job cuts
feed.summary: Cardinal Health is closing its KPR US LLC subsidiary in Augusta, Georgia, by September, leading to over 200 job cuts. The facility produces wound care products such as alcohol prep pads. This move follows other recent job reductions in Georgia's manufacturing sector.

feed.title: 12 Industrials Stocks Moving In Friday's Intraday Session
feed.summary: This article details the intraday movements of 12 industrial stocks on Friday, highlighting both gainers and losers. Notable movers include Shimmick, Commercial Vehicle Group, and Karat Packaging showing gains, while Agroz, Nocera, and Quest Resource Holding experienced declines. The report also mentions recent Q4 earnings releases for several of these companies.

feed.title: T-Mobile’s New Wireless Deals Offer Families Long-Term Savings
feed.summary: T-Mobile is offering new wireless deals, targeting families with long-term savings compared to Verizon and AT&T. According to a HarrisX study, families with more than three lines saved over $3,700 with T-Mobile in the past five years. New customers can get benefits like discounts on lines, free iPhones, unlimited talk and text, high-speed data, and included streaming services.

feed.title: Eastman CFO Willie McLain to Address J.P. Morgan Industrials Conference
feed.summary: Eastman Chemical Company's Executive Vice President and CFO, Willie McLain, is scheduled to speak at the J.P. Morgan Industrials Conference on March 18, 2026, at 10:45 a.m. ET. A live webcast of his presentation will be available on the company's investor relations website, with an audio replay also accessible after the event. The announcement was released on March 13, 2026, from Kingsport, Tennessee.

feed.title: Short Interest in Omnicom Group Inc. (NYSE:OMC) Rises By 77.8%
feed.summary: Omnicom Group Inc. (NYSE:OMC) experienced a significant 77.8% increase in short interest during February, reaching 46,725,132 shares, representing 15.2% of its outstanding stock. This rise occurred alongside the company missing quarterly earnings estimates, reporting EPS of $2.59 against an expected $2.94, despite a 27.9% year-over-year revenue increase. The board authorized a $5.0 billion share buyback and declared an $0.80 quarterly dividend, yielding approximately 4.1%.

feed.title: Eastman CFO Willie McLain to Address J.P. Morgan Industrials Conference
feed.summary: Eastman Chemical Company's CFO, Willie McLain, is scheduled to speak at the J.P. Morgan Industrials Conference on March 18, 2026, at 10:45 a.m. ET. The presentation will be webcast live on the company's investor relations website, with an audio replay available afterward. This announcement also includes contact information for investor relations and media inquiries.

feed.title: Why Has Avantor (AVTR) Dropped 13.6% Following Its Most Recent Earnings Announcement?
feed.summary: Avantor's stock declined by 13.6% after its Q4 2025 earnings announcement, where adjusted EPS decreased by 18.5% year-over-year despite exceeding Zacks Consensus Estimate. Revenue also declined 1.4% but surpassed analyst expectations. The company provided a cautious 2026 outlook with organic revenue growth projected between -2.5% and -0.5% and a Zacks Rank #4 (Sell) rating.

feed.title: Is Copart, Inc. (CPRT) A Good Stock to Buy?
feed.summary: Copart, Inc. (CPRT) faced weaker Q2 2026 results with declining global insurance units and revenue, attributed to cyclical pressures in the insurance vehicle market. Despite this, management sees long-term potential due to rising total loss frequency in modern vehicles and strengthened pricing power. The stock is considered attractively valued at 21x EV/FCF, having fallen 43% from its peak, and has seen share repurchases indicating management confidence.

feed.title: Cardinal Health WARN Act Investigation
feed.summary: Strauss Borrelli PLLC is investigating Kendall Patient Recovery US LLC (dba Cardinal Health) regarding a potential WARN Act violation stemming from a mass layoff of 211 employees in Augusta, Georgia. The law firm believes Cardinal Health may not have provided the required 60-day notice for the layoff, potentially entitling affected employees to severance pay and benefits. The WARN Act mandates that employers with 100 or more employees provide a 60-day notice for significant layoffs or plant closings.

feed.title: Amendment: Ong Yee Lung reports zero holdings in Bio Green Med (BGMS)
feed.summary: Ong Yee Lung has filed an amendment to Schedule 13G/A for Bio Green Med Solution, Inc. (BGMS), reporting zero beneficial ownership of the company's common stock. This filing indicates that Ong Yee Lung holds 0 shares, representing 0% of BGMS, and has no voting or dispositive power over any shares. The amendment, dated March 13, 2026, is considered to have a neutral sentiment and moderate impact on corporate governance.

feed.title: HeartBeam (NASDAQ: BEAT) Reports Q4 and Full-Year 2025 Results, Advances Commercialization and Clinical Development
feed.summary: HeartBeam (NASDAQ: BEAT) announced its financial and operational results for Q4 and full-year 2025, highlighting progress in commercialization following FDA 510(k) clearance for its 12-lead ECG synthesis software. The company has initiated a limited market launch, secured its first commercial partnership, and begun enrolling patients in a pilot study for heart attack detection. Key developments also include a prototype extended-wear ECG patch and a strategic AI collaboration with the Icahn School of Medicine at Mount Sinai.

feed.title: ISRG Intuitive Surgical (NASDAQ): $477.68 intraday on 13 Mar 2026, AI stock outlook
feed.summary: Intuitive Surgical (ISRG) stock is trading at $477.68, down 3.08% intraday on March 13, 2026, with a market cap of $170.20B. Meyka AI gives ISRG a "BUY" grade (B+) and forecasts a one-year upside target of 22.56% to $585.45, despite short-term pullback projections and a high P/E ratio near 60.74. The company shows strong revenue and net income growth, driven by surgical robotics and recurring consumables.

feed.title: AXT Inc (AXTI) Shares Up 10.22% on Mar 13
feed.summary: Shares of AXT Inc (AXTI) surged 10.22% to $51.48 on March 13, trading near its 52-week high. Despite the strong performance, analysts provide a conservative average price target of $25.40, indicating a potential downside of over 50%. GuruFocus also estimates a significant downside based on its GF Value of $2.12.

feed.title: AXTI’s Price Soars Amid Analyst Upgrades and Market Momentum
feed.summary: AXT Inc (NASDAQ: AXTI) stock saw a significant 9.33% increase, driven by investor optimism and analyst upgrades from Wedbush and Northland, who foresee strong growth in the indium phosphide space, especially with AI advancements. Despite recent setbacks like missing Q4 earnings predictions and negative pretax profit margins, the company's strategic market positioning and anticipated revenue growth have instilled renewed confidence among stakeholders. AXTI is attracting both momentum traders and long-term investors hoping to capitalize on AI growth trends, aligning with a broader industry momentum in tech.

feed.title: American Public Education Triumphs with Earnings Beat and Strategic Moves
feed.summary: American Public Education Inc. (APEI) saw its stock rise by 19.69% after a strong Q4 earnings report, surpassing revenue and EPS estimates. The company's strategic moves, including the lifting of growth restrictions on Rasmussen and the authorization of a $50M share repurchase program, have led to an increased price target from Barrington Research. These actions highlight APEI's focus on financial health and future growth, with expectations of increased enrollment and margin expansion by 2026.

feed.title: ACCO Brands' Price Target Lowered by Barrington Research | ACCO Stock News
feed.summary: Barrington Research has maintained its "Outperform" rating for ACCO Brands (ACCO) but lowered its price target from $6.00 to $5.00, representing a 16.67% decrease. This adjustment reflects current market evaluations and company performance, while still indicating confidence in ACCO Brands' potential. Wall Street analysts forecast an average target price of $8.33 for ACCO, implying a significant upside from its current price, with a consensus "Buy" status from brokerage firms.

feed.title: Vulcan Materials (VMC) Downgraded to Neutral by JPMorgan, Here’s Why
feed.summary: JPMorgan downgraded Vulcan Materials Company (VMC) to Neutral from Overweight, lowering its price target to $320 from $335. This change follows the company's fiscal Q4 2025 earnings, which fell short of expectations for both revenue and EPS, primarily due to stiff competition, pricing headwinds, and geopolitical shifts. JPMorgan also cited a weaker-than-expected guidance from management for 2026.

feed.title: Braemar Hotels & Resorts (BHR) Stock Analysis Report | Ratings, Financials & Performance
feed.summary: This report provides a comprehensive analysis of Braemar Hotels & Resorts (BHR), a real estate investment trust focused on luxury hotels. It covers the company's general information, stock performance, grading methodology, peer comparison, financial health including operating margin, quick ratio, and debt-to-equity, dividend history, and detailed financial statements for income, balance sheet, and cash flow.

feed.title: Micron Technology price target boosted on stronger-than-expected memory pricing
feed.summary: Wedbush analysts have raised their price target for Micron Technology (NASDAQ:MU) to $500, reiterating an 'Outperform' rating due to stronger-than-expected memory industry pricing trends. The firm noted that first-quarter contract pricing for DRAM and NAND exceeded expectations, expecting continued momentum, and has adjusted its modeling for price increases in upcoming fiscal quarters. Despite some uncertainties in precisely measuring the impact on Micron's financial statements, Wedbush maintains a positive outlook, applying a 5X multiple to their new financial year 2027 EPS estimates.

feed.title: Marathon Petroleum (NYSE:MPC) Insider Sells $406,851.80 in Stock
feed.summary: Marathon Petroleum (NYSE:MPC) insider Ricky Hessling sold 1,810 shares for $406,851.80, reducing his stake by 15.09%. The sale occurred on March 11th at an average price of $224.78 per share. This follows strong Q4 earnings, though analysts maintain a mixed outlook for 2026 due to potential crude supply and new refinery capacity risks.

feed.title: Lockheed Martin ramps up Alabama munitions production with $150M investment
feed.summary: Lockheed Martin plans to invest $150 million over five years in its Pike County facility in Alabama. This investment will expand munitions production, including missile systems like Javelin and HELLFIRE, and create new full-time positions. The company currently employs over 3,300 people across 30 sites in Alabama.

feed.title: Campbell’s Appoints Joshua Levine Chief Investor Relations Officer
feed.summary: The Campbell's Company has announced the appointment of Joshua Levine as its new Chief Investor Relations Officer, effective March 18, 2026. Levine, who previously held investor relations roles at Simply Good Foods and Sovos Brands, will report to CFO Todd Cunfer. He succeeds Rebecca Gardy, who is retiring after six years in the role, and will be responsible for engaging with the investment community and managing shareholder communications.

feed.title: Costco Wholesale Corporation Stock (ISIN: US22160K1051) Hits Record Highs on Earnings Beat and Expansion Momentum
feed.summary: Costco Wholesale Corporation stock surged to a record high of over $1,006 following a strong Q2 earnings beat, exceeding revenue and EPS expectations. The company demonstrated robust membership growth and outlined ambitious global warehouse expansion plans, attracting investor confidence, particularly from European investors seeking stability. Analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" rating, with strategic expansion and a resilient membership model highlighted as key drivers for long-term optimism despite premium valuation concerns.

feed.title: Electronic warfare autonomy software demonstrated by L3Harris, Shield AI
feed.summary: L3Harris Technologies and Shield AI recently demonstrated their integrated electronic warfare autonomy software. The demonstration involved L3Harris’ battle management ecosystem and Shield AI’s Hivemind software, enabling uncrewed systems to detect, analyze, and respond to electromagnetic threats in a simulated environment. This collaboration aims to provide autonomous electronic warfare capabilities using uncrewed aerial systems.

feed.title: PPG Industries (NYSE: PPG) SVP granted new phantom stock units
feed.summary: PPG Industries Inc.'s Senior Vice President, Amy R. Ericson, was granted 1.6022 phantom stock units, valued at $100.73 each. This grant increases her total phantom stock holdings within the company's deferred compensation plan to 229.4299 units. These phantom stock units convert to PPG common shares on a one-for-one basis upon the termination of her employment and represent an interest in an unfunded company stock fund.

feed.title: PPG (PPG) director awarded new phantom stock units in Form 4 filing
feed.summary: PPG Industries director Kathleen Ligocki was granted 62.2787 phantom stock units, which convert to common shares one-for-one upon her departure from the board. These units are part of PPG's Deferred Compensation Plan for Directors, where their value fluctuates with the company's stock performance. Following this award, Ligocki now holds a total of 6,953.5576 phantom stock units, linking her compensation to the long-term success of PPG.

feed.title: BGE Reinforces Commitment to Fight Rising Energy Costs as Part of “The Exelon Promise”
feed.summary: BGE has reaffirmed its commitment to combating rising energy costs through "The Exelon Promise," a new strategy by its parent company Exelon. This initiative focuses on immediate customer relief, strong customer protections, and long-term solutions to address the root causes of high energy prices. BGE is implementing various programs and advocating for policy changes to ensure affordable and reliable energy for central Maryland communities.

feed.title: Pfizer Targets Pediatric Ulcerative Colitis With New Etrasimod Trial: What Investors Should Watch
feed.summary: Pfizer Inc. is initiating a Phase 2 trial for its drug etrasimod in children with moderate to severe ulcerative colitis, aiming to evaluate its efficacy and safety in this young patient population. The open-label, single-arm study will have participants treated for up to 52 weeks with an option for a long-term extension. This move expands etrasimod's potential market and positions Pfizer against competitors like AbbVie and Johnson & Johnson in the inflammatory bowel disease space.

feed.title: Netflix to Announce First Quarter 2026 Financial Results
feed.summary: Netflix, Inc. (NASDAQ: NFLX) has announced that its first-quarter 2026 financial results and business outlook will be posted on its investor relations website on Thursday, April 16th, 2026, at approximately 1:01 p.m. Pacific Time. A live video interview with co-CEOs Ted Sarandos and Greg Peters, CFO Spence Neumann, and VP, Finance/IR & Corporate Development Spencer Wang will follow at 1:45 p.m. Pacific Time on the Netflix Investor Relations YouTube channel. The company notes that this announcement concerns its financial performance for the first quarter of 2026.

feed.title: McDonald's to pressure fast-food rivals with $3 and under menu items (MCD:NYSE)
feed.summary: McDonald's is reportedly adding new "$3 and under" menu items to its value platform in the U.S., starting in April. This move is expected to further intensify competition within the fast-food sector, following the company's recent strong performance driven by value offerings. The development comes as McDonald's continues to leverage its value strategy to attract customers.

feed.title: News Corp (Class B) Accelerates $1B Buyback as Management Signals Confidence in Valuation
feed.summary: News Corp (Class B) has initiated a $1 billion share repurchase program, targeting both Class A and Class B common stock. This aggressive buyback signals management's confidence in the company's intrinsic value amidst the challenges facing the media industry. The strategy aims to return capital to shareholders and improve per-share metrics, reflecting a belief that the stock is undervalued compared to available reinvestment opportunities.

feed.title: AutoNation Inc Stock (ISIN: US05329W1027) Faces Headwinds as Shares Slide Amid Automotive Retail Pressures
feed.summary: AutoNation Inc.'s stock has declined sharply in early 2026 due to broader challenges in the US auto retail sector, including softening demand, high inventory, and macroeconomic headwinds. The company's shares are trading around $190, experiencing negative returns year-to-date and ranking poorly among consumer cyclical performers. Despite robust free cash flow and strategic share repurchases, the outlook remains cautious due to industry pressures, though its scale may position it for a recovery.

feed.title: Smucker donates retail store to Akron-Canton Foodbank for Wayne County campus
feed.summary: The J.M. Smucker Co. has donated its retail store and over 30 acres of land in Orrville to the Akron-Canton Regional Foodbank, establishing a new Wayne County campus. This marks the largest gift in the agency's history, enabling phase one operations to begin this summer to serve the greater Wayne County area. Future plans, guided by community feedback, may include a pantry, home delivery, a community garden, and nutrition education.

feed.title: Starbucks union sent the company a proposed contract. Here's what baristas want
feed.summary: Starbucks Workers United has sent a comprehensive contract proposal to the coffee company, seeking 4% annual raises, broader workplace protections, and a $17 per hour starting wage. The union and Starbucks have faced stalled negotiations, with the company now proposing to resume in-person bargaining as early as March 30. This development comes amidst ongoing labor disputes, including strikes and investor scrutiny over Starbucks' labor relations.

feed.title: 6 grocery stores that may actually be cheaper than Walmart
feed.summary: A recent Consumer Reports study found that several grocery chains, including Costco, BJ's Wholesale Club, Aldi, Lidl, WinCo, and H-E-B, offer prices lower than Walmart. Costco and BJ's were found to be approximately 21% cheaper, while discount grocers like Aldi and Lidl were about 8% less expensive. The study highlights that by strategically shopping at different stores, consumers could save hundreds of dollars annually, as the price difference between the cheapest and most expensive grocers exceeded 33%.

feed.title: Sempra Stock (ISIN: US80413T1043) Faces Regulatory Headwinds Amid Infrastructure Transition
feed.summary: Sempra Energy is navigating significant regulatory and capital allocation challenges as California accelerates its energy transition. The company faces pressure on rate recovery and dividend sustainability due to increased capital expenditure for grid modernization and decarbonization mandates. This situation puts its predictable, rate-regulated earnings model under scrutiny, particularly for income-focused investors and European institutional buyers, despite its competitive dividend yield.

feed.title: John Deere Unveils 5M Series 5130M (130 HP) Tractor at Power & Technology Show in India
feed.summary: John Deere has launched its 5M Series 5130M (130 HP) tractor in India at the company's Power & Technology Show, highlighting its commitment to digital agriculture and connected machinery. The event showcased technologies aimed at improving farm productivity, soil health, and water conservation while aligning with India's sustainability goals. John Deere representatives emphasized the integration of precision agriculture and digital solutions to help farmers optimize resource use and output.

feed.title: Tesla to open new showroom in South Florida
feed.summary: Tesla is planning to open a new showroom in Kendall, South Florida, with an anticipated opening in late 2026. The announcement was made by Mark Dovich of the South Florida Business Journal. This expansion highlights Tesla's continued growth and presence in the Florida market.

feed.title: Regions accelerates plan to build 150 new branches
feed.summary: Regions Bank is speeding up its plan to build 135 to 150 new branches in Florida, Georgia, and Tennessee, reducing the timeline from seven to five years due to intensifying competition in its Southeast footprint. While constructing new locations, the bank anticipates closing an equivalent number of existing branches to maintain a flat overall count, adjusting to population shifts and combining facilities. CEO John Turner emphasized that customers still value in-branch advice and brand connection, despite the competitive landscape from larger lenders expanding in the region.

feed.title: Here’s What’s Next After Simon Property Completed $2 Billion in Acquisitions
feed.summary: Simon Property Group (SPG) has solidified its position as a cash-compounding machine, reporting record real estate FFO of $4.8 billion in 2025 and a 15% increase in its leasing pipeline. The company beat Q4 revenue estimates and provided strong 2026 FFO guidance, supported by robust portfolio NOI growth and high occupancy rates. With a significant redevelopment pipeline, a new $2 billion buyback program, and favorable analyst ratings, SPG is poised for continued growth, though tariff-driven retailer bankruptcies remain a primary risk.
